languages.text: "Хорошо, я тебе помогу. Но какова моя роль в этом эксперименте?"
"Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"
languages.original_text: "Хорошо, я тебе помогу. Но какова моя роль в этом эксперименте?"

traits.locale_text: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"
"Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"
"Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"

languages.text: 「わかった、君を助けるよ。でも、この実験で私はどんな役割を担うんだ？」
languages.original_text: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"

traits.locale_text: 「わかった、君を助けるよ。でも、この実験で私はどんな役割を担うんだ？」

languages.text: “很好，我会帮你。但我在这场实验中要扮演什么角色？”
languages.original_text: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"

traits.locale_text: “很好，我会帮你。但我在这场实验中要扮演什么角色？”

languages.text: «Muy bien, le ayudaré. Pero ¿qué función desempeño yo en este experimento?».
languages.original_text: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"

traits.locale_text: «Muy bien, le ayudaré. Pero ¿qué función desempeño yo en este experimento?».

languages.text: "Also schön, ich werde Euch helfen. Aber welche Rolle soll ich bei diesem Experiment spielen?"
languages.original_text: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"

traits.locale_text: "Also schön, ich werde Euch helfen. Aber welche Rolle soll ich bei diesem Experiment spielen?"

languages.text: « Très bien, je vais vous aider. Mais quel rôle suis-je {mf|censé|censée} jouer dans cette expérience ? »
languages.original_text: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"

traits.locale_text: « Très bien, je vais vous aider. Mais quel rôle suis-je {mf|censé|censée} jouer dans cette expérience ? »

languages.text: "Pekâlâ, yardım edeceğim. Bu deneyde benim rolüm ne olacak?"
languages.original_text: "Very well, I will help you. But what role am I to play in this experiment?"

traits.locale_text: "Pekâlâ, yardım edeceğim. Bu deneyde benim rolüm ne olacak?"
